author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: SplitBackward grad_fn in grad_fns/shape.rs zero-pads incoming gradient into original tensor shape at correct offset. split_t attaches SplitBackward when grad enabled. chunk_t gets autograd for free since it delegates to split_t. 4 new tests: grad_fn presence, 1D backward correctness, 2D chunk backward, no-grad passthrough. All 573 ferrotorch-core tests passing.
